ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shoe_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shoe size entry */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size number assigned to the shoe */,
  "footlength_cm" REAL /* Foot length in centimeters for the shoe size */,
  "eur_size" INTEGER /* EUR size equivalent */,
  "us_size" REAL /* US size equivalent */,
  "uk_size" REAL /* UK size equivalent */,
  "width" TEXT /* Width of the shoe (e.g., narrow, medium, wide) */,
  "heel_height_cm" REAL /* Heel height in centimeters */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Type of fit (e.g., standard, wide, narrow) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shoe_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shoe model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the shoe model */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the shoe */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the shoe (e.g., athletic, formal) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the shoe is designed for (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the shoe */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the shoe (e.g., leather, synthetic) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the shoe model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shoe model */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shoe size */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Stock level available for the size and model */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location where the inventory is stored (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES shoe_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, inventory specialist) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion entry */,
  "from_size_system" TEXT /* Size system being converted from */,
  "to_size_system" TEXT /* Size system being converted to */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion factor or rate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the conversion applies to */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Type of fit the conversion applies to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the conversion entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the conversion entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shoe model sold */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity sold */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location where the sale occurred */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the shoe was sold */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES shoe_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_report" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report entry */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total quantity of sales recorded */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from sales */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location for which the report is generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
